text: CE> (TO BE PULISHED IN THE Pt DUCHERRY GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA (BHARAT SARKAR) MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS (GRIH MANTRALAYA) •:: New Delhi dated 19"n April. 2007 NOTIFICATION In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963 (20 of 1963), the Central Government hereby nominates the following persons to be Members of the Legislative Assemblv of the Union Territory of Puducherrv. namely:— SHRI T. THIAGARAJAN SHRI NARA. KALAINATHAN, . SHRI N. G. PANNIRSELVAM [F. No. 11012/1/2007 -l I (B. A. COUTIjvLUOx- JOINT SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA -- 1 of 1 --
